title: miscolobium lateriflorum
intro: Miscolobium lateriflorum, also known as the Butterfly Pea or Blue Pea, is a flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Miscolobium lateriflorum include reducing inflammation, improving cognitive function, and lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, capsules, and infusions, which can be consumed for its medicinal properties.
